title: Aurora World Ltd 8-inch Mini Flopsie Molly Cat , Brown
features: From Aurora’s highly popular Mini Flopsies Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials.
Realistic animal with soft and cuddly bean bag bodies.
Children will love this cute and hugely collectible animal.
description: From the manufacturer About us Established in 1981, Aurora World offers an extensive range of branded products for children and adults. The company sells its product lines via a wide variety of retailers including major zoos, department stores, high-end toy stores and top gift chains, as well as hospital gift shops, fine florists, candy stores and gift/stationary stores worldwide. Aurora is known in the industry for its incredibly high quality products, range of diverse offerings. Aurora World Mini Flopsie Molly Cat Molly the ginger tabby is part of our Mini Flopsies collection. She is too cute not to have, she is in the laying position but the beans in her body allows her to be flexible. She is adored by cat lovers of all ages and is perfect for playtime. Bring Molly into your home today and she will bring joy for years to come. Especially popular with cat lovers, our Molly Cat lays on its tummy and measures 8" in length. Molly has soft ginger stripy fur with white highlights, yellow button eyes and a pink nose. Suitable from birth
